_comment: Groq-70B generation + norwegian-linguist review (2026-05-29, autopilot session 2c) to bring thin A1 concepts to >=30. 202 newly-generated candidates (delta vs pre-gen snapshot) reviewed across 4 parallel linguist passes; 132 KEEP seeded (written to staging/ready2c/, seed-staging --commit). ~65% true-keep. Notable defects the mechanical gate missed but the linguist caught: irregular verbs misfiled as preterite-regular (kjørte/gikk/skrev/sov/tok), Swedish forms (dricker, køber), Nynorsk forms (pengar, skei, ei), agreement errors (Huset er gammel), 2-word 'pronoun' sentences testing nothing, and the ENTIRE svo-word-order batch (missing terminal periods + trivial/ungrammatical).

kept_per_file.svo-word-order: 0/13 (entire batch dropped — missing periods + trivial/ungrammatical; regenerate)

a1_result: A1 596->728, avg 27.1->33.1/concept, 13 thin -> 3 thin (svo 25, numbers-basic 29, preterite-regular 29)
